# Alpha Zone Labs

> Websites, automation, apps, and digital systems for businesses that need clearer customer paths and smoother operations.

## Business identity

- Name: Alpha Zone Labs
- URL: https://alphazonelabs.com/
- Email: info@alphazonelabs.com
- Founder: Harold Ligon
- Positioning: Practical digital solutions for websites, workflows, and business systems

## Services

Alpha Zone Labs helps businesses analyze what is not working, discuss the best improvements, and move forward with practical digital solutions.

- Websites, redesigns, landing pages, local SEO, AI-ready content structure, and conversion cleanup
- Business automation using connected forms, spreadsheets, reminders, email workflows, and follow-up systems
- Custom apps, dashboards, portals, registration tools, admin panels, and lightweight business tools
- Digital workflow consulting, tech stack cleanup, launch planning, and process mapping

## Best fit

Alpha Zone Labs is best for small businesses, service businesses, nonprofits, restaurants, coaches, consultants, organizations, and growing teams that need clearer websites, smarter workflows, and practical digital systems.
